title: if Kaworu DID make contact with Lilith
display_title: if Kaworu DID make contact with Lilith
wikitext:
[]: if Kaworu DID make contact with Lilith             Quote Post by Boredom » Tue Nov 03, 2009 7:07 pm What would have happened if Kaworu DID make contact with Lilth, this has always bugged me....would we 3I?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Nov 03, 2009 7:10 pm Angelic Third Impact most likely.

[]:             Quote Post by Boredom » Tue Nov 03, 2009 7:12 pm But didn't he have to make contact with Adam? 0.0;

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Nov 03, 2009 7:17 pm All the angels were headed for Lillith. If an angel makes contact with Lillith that is what is believed what would take place. The Angelic Third Impact scenario is said to make the Earth habital for only angelic life.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Nov 03, 2009 7:25 pm 1. I believe that if this was true then "he" would have done it. 2. If he made contact then maybe it would be a 50/50 kinda thing since your mixing the two races. 3. I do wonder what an Angelic world that only Angels could live on would look like.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Tue Nov 03, 2009 8:08 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: 3. I do wonder what an Angelic world that only Angels could live on would look like.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Tue Nov 03, 2009 8:13 pm esselfortium wrote: Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: 3. I do wonder what an Angelic world that only Angels could live on would look like.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Nov 03, 2009 8:13 pm esselfortium wrote: Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: 3. I do wonder what an Angelic world that only Angels could live on would look like.

[]:             Quote Post by Rabid-Sachiel » Tue Nov 03, 2009 9:06 pm Hmm... It depends -- if Kaworu saw Shinji 1st, he would probably be influenced just like in the series, where Kaworu gives the speech about who should live on. However, if he saw Lilith 1st, he most likely would have caused 3I.

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Tue Nov 03, 2009 9:09 pm Wasn't he looking for Adam? I thought he was cutting his losses when he found out it was Lilith, by going out in an honorable fashion.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Nov 03, 2009 9:12 pm He thought Lillith was Adam.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Nov 03, 2009 11:16 pm Kinda funny knowing that even the great Kaworu can be wrong.

[]: Bl             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Wed Nov 04, 2009 4:09 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: He thought Lillith was Adam.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Nov 04, 2009 2:46 pm I don't believe that to be true, I do not think any Angel was trying to destroy just for the hell of it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Wed Nov 04, 2009 3:07 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: 3. I do wonder what an Angelic world that only Angels could live on would look like.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Nov 05, 2009 12:57 pm Sammaelo wrote: "Gets image of a Sachiel in a bathroom stall grabbing the arm of a Zeruel in the next stall when his dispenser runs out."

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Nov 05, 2009 3:46 pm I still want to know what a world for the remaining Angels would look like.

[]: Bl             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Thu Nov 05, 2009 4:59 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: I don't believe that to be true, I do not think any Angel was trying to destroy just for the hell of it.

[]: Re: Bl             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Nov 05, 2009 6:37 pm Alaska Slim wrote: Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: I don't believe that to be true, I do not think any Angel was trying to destroy just for the hell of it.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Thu Nov 05, 2009 6:48 pm No free will? What are you talking about?
